GetOutlookMailMessages.note: Retrieves Outlook mail messages. Requires Outlook connection. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)
GetOutlookMailMessages.description: Get Outlook Mail Messages activity from the mail category.
GetOutlookMailMessages.use_when: User wants to send or process email using Get Outlook Mail Messages.

MoveOutlookMessage.note: Self-closing tag. Moves an Outlook mail message to a specified folder. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)
MoveOutlookMessage.description: Move Outlook Message activity from the mail category.
MoveOutlookMessage.use_when: User wants to send or process email using Move Outlook Message.

SendOutlookMail.note: Sends an email via Outlook. Requires Outlook connection. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)
SendOutlookMail.description: Send Outlook Mail activity from the mail category.
SendOutlookMail.use_when: User wants to send or process email using Send Outlook Mail.

OutlookApplicationCard.note: OutlookApplicationCard is a scope activity with ActivityAction body requiring Studio configuration.
OutlookApplicationCard.description: Outlook Application Card (wizard-only) — must be configured through UiPath Studio's interactive wizard.
OutlookApplicationCard.use_when: Do not auto-generate Outlook Application Card. Direct the user to author it in UiPath Studio.

ForEachEmailX.note: ForEachEmailX iterates over emails with a dual-argument ActivityAction body requiring Studio configuration.
ForEachEmailX.description: For Each Email X (wizard-only) — must be configured through UiPath Studio's interactive wizard.
ForEachEmailX.use_when: Do not auto-generate For Each Email X. Direct the user to author it in UiPath Studio.
